name: Brussels Sprouts and Carrot Salad
recipeInstructions:
Cook the brussels sprouts according to package directions until they are crisp but tender. Drain.
Drain the carrots and add them to a bowl. Add the cooked brussels sprouts and Lemon Shaker Dressing; mix well.
Cover and refrigerate 4-6 hours before using. Stir occasionally.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES; CAL: 49; CHO: 11g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 273mg
For low-sodium diets, omit salt in cooking the brussels sprouts and from Lemon Shaker Dressing.
